title: isoetes histrix subsp. delalandei
intro: Isoetes histrix subsp. delalandei, also known as a species of quillwort, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the genus Isoetes, which is characterized by its distinctive quill-like leaves. The plant is said to have medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, due to its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Isoetes histrix subsp. delalandei include its ability to help reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. However, I couldn't find any reliable information on the specific herbal preparations or common uses of this plant.
